testcase.name: [chromium] Coursera Project
testcase.system-out:
Card 1 title: Introduction to HTML, CSS, & JavaScript Card 1 rating: 4.4 Card 1 level/duration: Beginner · Course · 1 - 4 Weeks ----- Card 2 title: Meta Full Stack Developer: Front-End & Back-End from Scratch Card 2 rating: 4.7 Card 2 level/duration: Beginner · Specialization · 3 - 6 Months ----- ========================================== ✅ Total Courses in English Language : 10,142 ✅ Total Courses at Beginner Level : 5,093 ========================================== ✅ Navigated to Enterprise: https://www.coursera.org/business?utm_campaign=website&utm_content=corp-to-home-footer-for-enterprise&utm_medium=coursera&utm_source=enterprise ✅ Navigated to Campus: testcase.name: [firefox] Coursera Project
testcase.system-out:
Card 1 title: Introduction to HTML, CSS, & JavaScript Card 1 rating: 4.4 Card 1 level/duration: Beginner · Course · 1 - 4 Weeks ----- Card 2 title: Meta Full Stack Developer: Front-End & Back-End from Scratch Card 2 rating: 4.7 Card 2 level/duration: Beginner · Specialization · 3 - 6 Months ----- ========================================== ✅ Total Courses in English Language : 10,142 ✅ Total Courses at Beginner Level : 5,093 ========================================== ✅ Navigated to Enterprise: https://www.coursera.org/business?utm_campaign=website&utm_content=corp-to-home-footer-for-enterprise&utm_medium=coursera&utm_source=enterprise ✅ Navigated to Campus: https://www.coursera.org/campus?utm_campaign=website&utm_content=corp-to-home-footer-for-campus&utm_medium=coursera&utm_source=enterprise Institution Type Array: [ { value: [32m''[39m, text:
